original:
Lion-Os are the X-rated genemod of choice for those who want to add some predatory spice to their life and have fun doing it! They were created in a rare partnership between the finest TamaniCorp scientists and JoyCo’s pharmaceutical division in the idle years following the last Planet Rush. Development produced a decade-long spike in the value of milodan genetic material and led to the seeding of numerous uninhabited worlds with terran lions - an act which has made them one of the more populous predators in the known galaxy to this day.

Lion-Os come in a proprietary hypospray that is to be applied directly to the bare loins (and only the loins). Use only in the comfort and privacy of your own home. JoyCo is not responsible for decency violations resulting from public use. Lion-Os are not to be used by minors. Lion-Os may cause headaches, nausea, unexplained growling, protein cravings, euphoria, depression, and dental misalignment in rare cases. If you experience any of these side effects, please consult your physician.

Improperly ventilated application may result in debilitatingly intense effects.

This box has seen some better days though....
